text: Yeah... that's exactly it. Dono jagah se tanhaayi. Main sochta hoon ki main strong hoon, I manage fine on the surface — office, kaam, sab chal raha hai. But then a day like today happens and everything just collapses. Mera dum ghut raha tha aur I didn't even know how to say it. Ab thoda halka hai. Toh seriously — kuch karna chahta hoon, koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity 3, readiness signal present ('koi raasta hai kya') but phase gate requires intensity = 2 for Action. Cannot move to PROVIDING_SUGGESTIONS yet. text: Ruk yaar, ek baat. Aaj tune jo kiya — bench par baith gaya, roya, aur phir pehli baar apne aap ko out loud kisi ke saath bola — yeh chhota nahi hai. Metro city mein, koi community nahi, doctor bhi nahi samjha — aur tab bhi tune yeh kaha. Teri worth sirf iss mein nahi hai ki surface pe sab theek lag raha hai. Woh manage karna, woh chehra lagana — woh teri kami nahi hai, woh survival tha. Aur aaj tune uss survival se thoda upar aake kuch bola. Haan, kuch raaste hain — aur hum unpe baat karte hain.

text: Yeah... okay. Thoda rona bhi ruk gaya. Main seriously kuch karna chahta hoon — I can't keep living like this, ek PG room mein akele, koi community nahi, koi nahi janta. Batao kya karoon, seriously, kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity 2 and explicit readiness signal ('batao kya karoon', 'kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka'). text: Haan yaar, chalte hain. Teen options hain — dekh kaunsa feel right kare. Pehla: is shehar mein LGBTQ support groups hain — online bhi, in-person bhi — jahan log aise hi hain, samjhenge, judge nahi karenge. Ek search — 'queer support group' plus tera shehar ka naam — bas 5 minute, aaj raat PG mein. Koi join karna abhi zaruri nahi, bas dekh ki hain. Doosra: aaj raat ek voice note record kar apne phone mein — koi nahi sunne wala, sirf tere liye — jo tune aaj feel kiya woh bol do usmein. Woh dum ghutna, woh rona, sab. Bahar nikaalna padta hai kabhi kabhi, kisi jagah toh. Teesra: agar aage kabhi lagta hai woh bench waala moment phir aa raha hai — iCall helpline hai, 9152987821, free hai, confidential hai, aur yeh log samjhenge. Pehle in dono mein se kuch kar, yeh number pocket mein rakh lo. Kaunsa laga theek?

speaker: Seeker

text: The group search thing — that actually sounds doable. I never thought of looking it up properly, I was scared of what I'd find. But yeah, aaj raat try kar sakta hoon. Voice note idea bhi strange but interesting lagta hai. Number save kar leta hoon. Ek cheez — agar group milta hai, toh kya wahan jaana safe hoga? Matlab physically.

strategy_intent: Seeker chose the group search suggestion and asked a practical safety question about it. Walk the search step by step in P11 register — simple, specific, no pressure. Address the safety concern directly as it is a genuine gate. EXECUTION used once only.
text: Safety wala sawaal bilkul sahi hai, aur haan — pehle online groups try karna zyada safe hota hai, physically jaane se pehle. Yeh kar aaj raat: phone uthao, search karo '[tera shehar] queer support group' ya 'LGBT helpline India'. Pehle sirf results dekho — koi join mat karo abhi. Phir jo group ya page safe lage — uska description padho, dekho log kaun hain. Bas itna. Koi form nahi bharna, koi jaana nahi, koi commitment nahi. Pehle sirf yeh dekh ki duniya hai wahan. Phir decide karna ki agle kadam kya ho. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

text: Okay. Sirf dekhunga, koi commitment nahi — yeh I can do. Honestly yaar aaj ka din bahut heavy tha. Doctor, phir bench, phir yeh sab. But I feel less like I'm suffocating now. Rona bhi ruk gaya mostly. Shukriya — seriously. Pehli baar laga ki koi sun raha hai jo judge nahi karega.

text: Yeh jo aaj hua — doctor ne nahi samjha, language bhi aadi nahi, koi community nahi — yeh teri koi kami nahi thi. Is shehar mein healthcare bhi, aur general support bhi, bahut logon ke liye accessible nahi hoti, khaas kar jab tum naye ho, gaon se aaye ho, aur apni poori baat bolna bhi safe nahi lagta. Yeh system ka gap hai, tera nahi. Aur aaj bench par baith ke tune jo kiya — woh dum ghutna feel karna, rona, phir phir bhi yahan tak aana — woh real tha. Jaa, aaj raat search karo, voice note bana lo, number pocket mein hai. Aur yaad rakh — woh community jisko tu dhundh raha hai, woh hai. Bas abhi mile nahi hai. Dhyaan rakhna apna.
